title: pyrus astracanica
intro: Pyrus astracanica, also known as the Astrakhan pear tree, is a species of deciduous tree native to Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pyrus astracanica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The tree's bark, leaves, and fruit can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine.
